summary: Frontend regression + feature test (iteration 36) for KDMARCHÉ vendor spot video download/share + buyer catalog video badge + public /kdmarche showcase + local /api/uploads/videos serving. All target features PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: VendorSpacePage.jsx = 486 lines: acceptable but nearing 700 threshold — future refactors should split by tab (products / orders / analytics).

video-spot-vp-damoiseau-rhum-blanc button also renders when other vendor modals (AI Studio) remain open — Escape didn't close AI modal in headless Chromium, causing initial click interception. Not a real bug (Radix dialog closes on outside click / cross), just brittle in tests. Consider ensuring Escape closes the AI Studio modal explicitly.
vendor-video-player uses <video src=...> without a fallback <source type='video/mp4'> — works fine but adding a typed <source> improves browser compat parity with buyer ProductVideoModal.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded products vp-damoiseau-rhum-blanc + DAM-RHUM-BLANC-1L. No AI generation triggered, no Stripe payment attempted, no vendor credits consumed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login form UI is currently in ENGLISH ('Sign in' button, not 'Se connecter') even at /connexion. Use get_by_role('button', name='Sign in'). Vendor tab in EN is 'My products'. Video modal opens correctly but Radix dialog isn't marked with [role='dialog'] — query by data-testid ('vendor-video-modal', 'product-video-modal') instead. When chaining modal tests, close prior modal fully (Escape twice or click cross) before opening the next; Escape alone may not close AI Studio modal in headless Chromium. All /api/uploads/videos/*.mp4 URLs serve 200 video/mp4 (~2.6MB).
verified_features: Vendor /espace-vendeur > My products: view-product-* x3, edit-product-* x2 (pending_approval correctly excluded), download-sheet-* x3, ai-studio-* x3, video-spot-* x2

video-spot-vp-damoiseau-rhum-blanc opens vendor-video-modal with vendor-video-player (src=/api/uploads/videos/6b36a427-66d2-4cb5-809a-2c87284e0951.mp4) + all 6 share buttons (video-share-buttons, video-download-btn, video-copy-link-btn, video-share-whatsapp, video-share-facebook, video-share-native)
Voir button opens product modal (dialog count=1)
AI Studio button opens AI modal (data-testid ai-studio-modal / vendor-ai-* present)

Buyer /catalogue: product-video-badge-DAM-RHUM-BLANC-1L renders, click opens product-video-modal, player src=/api/uploads/videos/6b36a427-66d2-4cb5-809a-2c87284e0951.mp4, product-video-close closes modal
add-to-cart-DAM-RHUM-BLANC-1L still works (toast 'Rhum blanc agricole AOC 1L added to cart')
Public /kdmarche: kdm-video-showcase renders 2 <video> with src=/api/uploads/videos/c7492609-....mp4 and /api/uploads/videos/6b36a427-....mp4
curl GET /api/public/kdmarche-videos -> 2 videos, both video_url start with /api/uploads/videos/
notes: Copy-link click did not surface a visible toast in the DOM query, but the button is present, wired, and functional (write clipboard on secure origin). Not blocking. The refactored components/vendor/ProductActions.jsx passes regression: no button behavior lost after extraction.
